items.name: Chains 💎
items.description:
This fire awesome and classic solid iced out diamond chain / silver necklace has a subtle glowing effect in bright light environments . It's great for any of the coolest and most awsome gamer outfits that want that diamonds glow . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / or Y2K / retro -- wear this epic and icy necklace . The ice part of this necklace is white and looks like a crystal / pearl gem .
